Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/Users/suhan/AION mark01/.claude/worktrees/affectionate-jones-1b7d1a/112.json'\)\); print\('zones:', len\(d.get\('zones',[]\)\)\); print\('media:', len\(d.get\('media',[]\)\)\); print\('duration:', d.get\('simulationConfig',{}\).get\('duration'\)\); print\('hasGraph:', 'waypointGraph' in d\); g=d.get\('waypointGraph'\) or {}; print\('nodes:', len\(g.get\('nodes',[]\)\)\); print\('edges:', len\(g.get\('edges',[]\)\)\); print\('entries:', len\([n for n in g.get\('nodes',[]\) if n.get\('type'\)=='entry']\)\); print\('exits:', len\([n for n in g.get\('nodes',[]\) if n.get\('type'\)=='exit']\)\)")
